channel.title: travel on Jeroen Nyckees
channel.description: Recent content in travel on Jeroen Nyckees

item.title: "They Work for Nothing"
item.description: Porto Moniz, a quiet little town on the most north eastern end of the island Madeira. In this little town one of the famous levada trails on the island finds its head. The trail takes you along an amazing irrigation channel leading water from high up in the mountains through the valley down to the people in this little town. After my girlfriend and I completed the trail we hitchhiked back to the little town and stayed in the local youth hostel.
